channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Woolen's late interception seals win as Seahawks beat struggling Bears 6-3 to boost playoff hopes
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Seattle Seahawks made just enough plays to boost their fading playoff hopes by beating the struggling Chicago Bears on Thursday night. Now, they'll be rooting for the Arizona Cardinals to beat the Los Angeles Rams this weekend.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jaden Ivey's 4-point play with 3 seconds left rallies Pistons past Kings 114-113
item.description: Jaden Ivey converted a four-point play with 3 seconds left and the Detroit Pistons rallied past the struggling Sacramento Kings 114-113.
item.dc:creator: Eric He, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Cowboys shutting down CeeDee Lamb with 2 games to go over receiver's shoulder issue
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys are shutting down CeeDee Lamb with two games remaining after their 2023 All-Pro receiver spent the second half of the season dealing with a sprained right shoulder.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Red Wings hire former Sharks head coach McLellan after firing Lalonde
item.description: Ex-San Jose Sharks head coach McLellan takes over in Detroit, where he once helped the Red Wings win a Stanley Cup title.
item.dc:creator: Tribune News Service, The Mercury News

item.title: NFL Hall of Famer calls out George Pickens amid Steelers three-game slide
item.description: NFL legend Terrell Owens called out Steelers wide receiver George Pickens for his mishaps in Pittsburgh's third straight loss, this time against the Kansas City Chiefs Christmas Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Teddy Bridgewater comes out of retirement to sign with Lions after winning high school state title as coach
item.description: After coaching his alma mater to a high school state title in Florida, quarterback Teddy Bridgewater is out of retirement and back with the Detroit Lions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2 sailors die in the stormy first night of the Sydney to Hobart yacht race, organizers say
item.description: Two sailors on separate boats have been killed in boom accidents two hours apart on a storm-ravaged first night of the annual Sydney to Hobart race, adding to the event’s long history of deaths at sea.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Simona Halep withdraws from Australian Open qualifying because of knee and shoulder pain
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Two-time Grand Slam champion Simona Halep pulled out of Australian Open qualifying and a tuneup tournament in Auckland, New Zealand, on Thursday because of pain in her knee and shoulder, the latest interruption of her comeback from a drug suspension.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Mahomes reveals crucial promise that was fulfilled as Chiefs grab No. 1 seed in playoffs
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs star quarterback Patrick Mahomes revealed he kept a pretty important promise to his wife as the team attained the No. 1 seed in the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Durant and Beal score 27 points each, Suns beat Nuggets 110-100 to close out Christmas slate
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Kevin Durant and Bradley Beal each scored 27 points and the Phoenix Suns beat the Denver Nuggets 110-100 on Wednesday night in the nightcap to the NBA’s Christmas slate of games.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James scores 31 in record 19th Christmas Day game as Lakers hold off Curry, Warriors 115-113
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Austin Reaves scored the winning layup with one second left after Stephen Curry tied it on a 31-foot 3-pointer with seven seconds remaining, LeBron James had 31 points and 10 assists playing in his NBA-record 19th Christmas Day game, and the Los Angeles Lakers held off the Golde
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jackson breaks Vick's NFL rushing record for QBs in Ravens' rout over Texans
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Baltimore’s Lamar Jackson passed Michael Vick for the most rushing yards by a quarterback in NFL history in a 31-2 victory over the Houston Texans on Wednesday. “Michael Vick, one of my favorite players,” Jackson said. “That’s just dope.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texans look for answers after embarrassing 31-2 home loss to the Ravens
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Quarterback C.J. Stroud summed up Houston’s performance in an embarrassing 31-2 loss to Baltimore on Wednesday. “Sometimes you go out there and lay an egg,” Stroud said. “It’s not easy to say that, but that’s what happened. Didn’t play well from the first play to the last.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Beyoncé's performance highlighted Netflix's NFL debut on Christmas Day
item.description: Beyoncé provided more excitement than either game during Netflix’s NFL debut on Christmas Day. Riding into her halftime appearance on a white horse, the 32-time Grammy winner rocked her hometown Houston crowd with a nearly 13-minute performance on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mahomes throws 3 TDs as Chiefs clinch AFC's top seed by breezing past the skidding Steelers 29-10
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Andy Reid donned a Santa Claus suit in a giddy Kansas City Chiefs locker room on Christmas Day, then handed his team a present it increasingly looks like it deserves: home-field advantage throughout the AFC playoffs.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Reports: Pete Carroll interested in Bears' head-coaching job
item.description: Former Seattle Seahawks head coach Pete Carroll has expressed interest in becoming the next head coach of the Chicago Bears, who are looking to fill their head coaching vacancy for the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Trump floats NHL legend Wayne Gretzky as Canadian prime minister amid Trudeau turmoil
item.description: President-elect Trump expressed his support for former NHL great Wayne Gretzky as prime minister of Canada in a post on social media on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs clinch No. 1 seed, first-round bye in playoffs with dominant win over Steelers
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs clinched the no. 1 seed in the AFC and a first-round bye with their 29-10 win over the Pittsburgh Steelers on Christmas day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
